deliverables: Material direction board (contemporary; natural stone and stucco)
Preliminary space arrangement aligned with 337 sqm program
Preliminary concept submitted to HOA design review committee
phases.milestone: Concept design client approval + HOA early feedback received

deliverables: Elevations all four facades (1:100) — natural stone/stucco facade
Site plan with property boundaries, setbacks, access, parking
Covenant compliance checklist (setbacks, 7m height, facade materials, parking, style)
Written HOA approval from Residencial Vista del Mar
phases.milestone: Client written approval of architectural design + written HOA approval received

deliverables: Structural engineering drawings integrated with architectural set
Electrical single-line diagram and panel schedules
Lighting layout plan with fixture specifications
phases.milestone: All engineering inputs confirmed; no coordination conflicts

deliverables: Fully coordinated construction drawing set (architectural + structural + MEP)
Detail sheets: wall sections, stairs, roof details, openings
Door and window schedule with specifications
Built-in furniture drawings (kitchen, closets, built-in shelving)
Final HOA-compliant drawing set bearing HOA approval stamp
phases.milestone: Executive plans package + HOA-approved drawing set delivered — M3 payment trigger

deliverables: Bid package sent to minimum 2 contractors
Submission to Municipio de Los Cabos, BCS
phases.milestone: Building permit issued — M4 payment trigger

notes: HOA review in Phases 1 and 2 adds 2–4 weeks vs. standalone residential. Permitting duration is authority-dependent (4–16 weeks typical); 14 weeks used as working estimate for Los Cabos. M5 is post-permit and covers construction start confirmation.
